sampledNotFormalDisclosure.statement: This consequence diff is computed over a sampled fixture matrix of 2 principal×resource×action cells evaluated against the real policy decision point. It is an empirical measurement of the decision delta on those cells, NOT a formal proof that no other decision differs. Widen the matrix to raise assurance; it can never be exhaustive.

deltas.businessConsequence: Principals holding role(s) [platform_admin] GAIN 'register' access to agent — currently denied, would be allowed.
Principals holding role(s) [platform_admin] GAIN 'invoke' access to agent — currently denied, would be allowed.
